tree.name: Will Richard
tree.tradeDescription: GSW traded Justinian Jessup, Jahmai Mashack, and 2032 2nd (GSW own) to MEM for Will Richard
tree.note: Florida guard, acquired from Memphis Grizzlies

assetsGivenUp.name: Justinian Jessup
assetsGivenUp.note: Boise State guard, drafted 51st overall by GSW in 2020

assetsGivenUp.name: Jahmai Mashack
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 7-team trade: GSW traded Koby Brea to PHO; HOU traded Jahmai Mashack to GSW; PHO traded Alex Toohey to GSW (among many other moves)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Houston in 7-team trade, immediately flipped to Memphis

assetsGivenUp.name: Koby Brea
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 41st overall by GSW in 2025 using pick acquired from BKN (originally MIA own)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2032 2nd Round Pick (GSW own)
assetsGivenUp.note: GSW own 2nd rounder sent to MEM
